name: slidex-desktop
description: Electron desktop shell for the slidex CLI workflow.
author: slidex contributors

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,main,electron -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm run dev:renderer" "pnpm run dev:main" "pnpm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:wsl: concurrently -k -n renderer,main,windows -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm run dev:renderer:wsl" "pnpm run dev:main" "pnpm run dev:electron:wsl"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 dist/main/index.js dist/preload/index.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.dev:electron:wsl: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 dist/main/index.js dist/preload/index.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 node scripts/dev-windows-host.cjs
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:renderer
